minor_notes: The lecture provides a strong, non-technical foundation for the 'why' behind DevOps, which is crucial for a first lesson.
All three learning objectives are clearly and explicitly covered.
The diagrams are simple, effective, and correctly map to the concepts explained in the text.
The inclusion of the 'DevOps Engineer' role and the mention of SRE provides a helpful, practical context that connects the philosophy to the job market.
The restaurant analogy is a very effective and accessible way to summarize the core conflict for a beginner audience.
